application_received.description: Initial confirmation that the application was received.

in_review.description: The application is being actively reviewed.

missing_documents.description: The recruiter needs additional documents or information.

online_interview.description: The application moved to an interview stage.

on_site_interview.description: A deeper interview stage is in progress.

offer.description: An offer has been made and needs attention.

on_hold.description: The process is paused or delayed.
